summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Petrol Grava Services website redesign completed successfully. All immersive features including Ken Burns carousel, 3D tilt cards, glass-morphism navbar, bilingual support, and smooth scrolling are working perfectly.
passed_tests: Ken Burns cinematic carousel effect on homepage hero
Stats section displays with animated counters (+27, 76,402, 465, 10)
Services section shows 6 cards with hover effects
Language toggle (ES/EN) switches all text content
Services dropdown in navbar shows all 10 services
Footer displays all 10 services with proper links
Service detail page loads correctly when clicking a service
Contact page form renders with all fields (name, email, phone, message)
Navigation links work (About, Mission & Vision, Contact)
Glass-morphism navbar appears on scroll (bg-transparent → glass shadow-lg)
Smooth scrolling implemented with Lenis library
Service cards display proper hover effects
All CTA buttons are functional and properly linked
Responsive design functioning on desktop viewport
